summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bill Number Generation system. All 16 backend API tests passed, frontend UI verified with all elements functional. System correctly generates sequential bill numbers (INV-XXXXXX), draft bills use DRAFT- prefix without consuming sequence numbers, sales returns use RTN- prefix, and concurrent bill creation generates unique sequential numbers (verified with 5 concurrent requests).

backend: GET /api/settings/bill-sequences returns current sequences with INV and RTN
PUT updates sequence length (changed to 8 digits verified)
Validation rejects prefix longer than 10 characters (400 error)
Validation rejects prefix with special characters (400 error)
Validation blocks starting number lower than last used
Draft bills use DRAFT- prefix and don't consume sequence numbers
Settled bills get INV-XXXXXX sequential format
Consecutive bills are sequential (verified INV-00001001 -> INV-00001002)
Sales returns use RTN- prefix (verified RTN-000002)
Concurrent bill creation generates unique sequential numbers (5 concurrent bills)
frontend: Settings page loads correctly with Bill Sequence tab visible
Bill Sequence tab clickable and shows configuration UI
Current Sequences table displays INV and RTN rows with document types
Table shows Last Used, Next Number, and Format columns
Configure button opens edit form with correct prefix populated
Preview section shows live formatted bill number preview
Important Notes section displays rules about bill number generation
Validation error shown for invalid input (400 response from API)

critical_code_review_comments: generate_bill_number() uses atomic findOneAndUpdate with upsert for concurrency safety - good implementation
Bill number format follows {PREFIX}-{PADDED_SEQUENCE} as specified
Draft bills correctly use DRAFT- prefix instead of consuming sequence numbers
Validation properly checks starting_number > current_sequence to prevent reuse
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test bills: TEST Draft Customer, TEST Sequential Customer, TEST Consecutive 0/1, TEST Return Customer, TEST Concurrent 0-4. Bills have INV- numbers from 00001000 to 00001007.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bill Number Sequence system fully functional. Key selectors: data-testid='bill-sequence-tab' for tab, data-testid='sequence-prefix-input', data-testid='sequence-starting-number', data-testid='sequence-length-select', data-testid='save-sequence-btn'. Current INV sequence at 1007 (next will be INV-00001008), RTN at 2 (next RTN-000002). MongoDB collection: bill_number_sequences. Draft bills have format DRAFT-{timestamp}-{uuid}.
